samples:
I'm dying to see you
Your love is so cold, I just can't handle this
You say that we belong together and I believe you
But when we meet you leave me alone


Now the time has come for us to part
No one else will understand my pain
So please don't try to stop me
If you do then I must run away
This way I have no other choice left but to survive
And now it's over, there's nothing left to prove or say
Until another day comes along where I may be strong enough
To fight against these feelings of weakness inside
The only chance I have to stay alive in this mess of lies
Is by letting go of everything I know to be true


There are certain things in life I want to remember
Like you telling me you love me while holding me tight
Please let me keep this promise as a reminder
That even if you're gone, your soul'll live forever bright

You're not the first to come and knock on my door
You can't remember where you belong anymore
Now I will open wide, let all your pain escape
But this is just a sign that something has to change


Open wide, let it go
Wide open, set it free


There's no need for me to see through you
If you cannot find the strength in yourself


No one ever told you what was right or wrong
And now there's blood upon your hands


What have we become? It's time to make a stand
Don't be afraid of feeling bad
Change won't come easy, but that doesn't mean
We should stay the same forever
Stand up tall like a soldier
Face the fear within
Get up, get up, get up, rise above it


Be strong as an ox
Strong as an ox
Strong as an ox
Strong as an ox



I don't know how else to tell you
This other way must open if we are ever gonna heal
It's so clear to see at last
But why didn't anyone tell us before?


The old ways have to die, they've outlived their time
They took our land from under our feet
But hope burns inside, hope burns within
So burn it bright and watch it burn

I've been waiting for this moment my whole life
All the fears that I had are now gone
And when it comes, oh so true and strong
The fear is no longer there


Fear of being alone in a dark cold place
Afraid to go through this test of time
But now you see me here on this sacred ground
Reaching out my hand just to touch the sky


Oh, what an honor
To feel alive
My body rising up from where I lay
Another step on my way to be awake
For I am now ready to face myself


This power lies within your heart
It will overcome the world
When you choose, you can fly


You don't have to live forever
There is another chance for you
But only if you try


No more reasons why I should hold back now
Let go of the past and rise above the clouds
I let go of all those burdens weighing down
My feet, these chains that bound me
Are tearing me apart


Oh, what an honor
To feel alive
My body rising up from where I lay
Another step on my way to be awake
For I am now ready to face myself

I've been a soldier all my life, a warrior all along
I took the first step with pride, but it never felt so wrong


Now I know that we have to change, and now I'm begging you to stay
But I have come too far away not to see this through


The world is dying, the rivers are black, the sky is falling
If you want freedom, then free yourself from hate and fear
Don't judge your neighbour until you walk in his shoes
And don't let hatred poison those who mean well
We must survive, for the sake of our own existence
We must be strong, no matter what comes our way
If you want your child to grow into a man or woman
You will have to start with them where they are
All over again, before they can move on
And hope grows stronger when you overcome temptation


It's time we said good-bye to ignorance and foolishness
If we truly understand this world, we cannot stay the same


You say you need a king to rule this land, while others kneel
We just laugh at your claims; you would crush us if you could


Freedom of choice, responsibility of being alive
Choose now to lead by example, forgive and forget
Open up your heart and mind to new experiences
Open wide your arms to embrace all there is
Embrace every living soul as a gift from above
There is power in love that nothing can destroy
Find compassion deep inside and realize that anger
Is just another part of yourself which you must slay


Freedom of choice, responsibility of being alive

What I want to do, I'm told not to
I won't follow these rules anymore
Don't you see? I need this change inside me
My soul needs it now


The day will come when we reach Eden
When reason comes and takes us by the hand
And through the eyes of faith we'll see the light
Of that bright land where none have been before


You may not believe in anything but blood and iron
But what if one day a new creation is born?
Will you bow down to reason or kneel to fear?

Just because there is no proof that God exists
Why should we assume he does not?
We know we are all one, so why don't we act like it?
Follow your heart and mind

Every step of the way there is magic all around
This world has just begun, another dawn appears

There is something out there calling you to come away
It's time for you to go and find yourself


In the midst of hatred, confusion, and pain
A new dawn appears, bringing hope and love

Now you are in my eyes, I don't even recognize you
You told me your name and your age, but it was just a lie
And when you were born into this world, the only reason to live
Was your mother and then she died, and now all you want is what is mine


I know you wanna take my life
So turn around and run away


Well now that we're here, it seems like fate has chosen our side
But if this kind of luck isn't meant for us, we will never learn how lucky we have been
It feels good to be alive and awake; now go away
Let's stay out all night and watch the sun come up over the wall


We can leave this place tonight
The light won't get any brighter


We could all die today
I need not fear anything from anyone
Just let me try before I fade away

My dear sweet boy, I wish I had a way to make things right
My love for you may never end, but there is nothing I can do
So hold on tight while I jump off and fly
I'm free at last

A wall I cannot scale
Is the only thing that's there for me
I'm paralyzed by fear
And unable to escape it


Despise the voice inside of my head
Begging and pleading with me to choose a side


Can't you see this is what they wanted?
They always want control over everything
But now, now they've been pushed aside
They have no power, none at all


Don't know why we put up with this kind of shit
You take our blood, your words are bitter poison
We're dying in the cold hands of these monsters


The end is coming soon, we'll be free soon enough
No more walls to climb, nothing left to prove
Now we know where we belong, our time has come
So we stand united and fight together


When I look deep within myself
There is something buried alive and dying


It's too late for tears now
It's too late for prayers now

Don't wanna hear your lies
I can see right through you
And I am tired of the games
You play to make yourself feel high


Don't wanna be a part
Of this world of confusion
So I go my own way
To find a better reason to live


When everything has been taken from me, I stand here all alone
I want to disappear in this crowd and fade away but, oh, no!
The light shines upon me, it comes down to me now and sets me free
It is time for me to choose, there is only one choice to make

You are lying when you say that we are one
Your words just don't mean anything at all to me
Why don't you open up? Why don't you try?
You know deep inside yourself that you will fall
Into nothingness someday, so let us end it all
What good is it to keep on living if I must follow?
There is no point in carrying this weight around
No use to lie to yourself anymore
Let us all rise up, come together, unite, become one

I've got a story to tell
About something I did
You are the only one, who can hear me now


"I am the king of pain, my crown is heavy
My throne is cold and hard like iron
I cannot rest my body for long in this
Cold and black chamber, but it doesn't hurt me"


In all these years you have been by my side
You were there from start until end
It was love at first sight when we met
And I fell asleep in your embrace


But now that the dream has become real
This pain will never end
If you don't want to let me go
We both know what to do


There is no reason to hold back now
The gates are open wide
Now I just lay here in a pool of blood
Forced to watch myself die

A cry of agony rings out loud
From deep inside me, this anguish
My heart burns too hot to contain it
This fire must be released

One day soon you'll see
Your life become a million miles away from me
Soon I will not recognize
This world of confusion


Give in to the fear and anguish
The pain is too strong, but there's no reason to panic
You're all alone, it doesn't matter what you do
There's nothing left for us to take
But let us die together now
Before we fade away


Fade away
We have come too far
To turn back now
So join us all
Beneath the ground
And stay with us until time brings new creation
I don't want to live anymore
I know that death is something beautiful
When our lives are over
Like the rising sun, so beautiful

Let's say goodbye one last time
Then lay down beneath this cold grey stone
Fade away... fade away
Into the earth below
Until you reach your destination
A paradise, another dimension beyond


Innocent little children
They've lost their innocence on some strange planet
Why did they leave behind such a mess?
That's none of my business now
I pray you'll find another way out
Just like I did, fade away
